pi_items.source: NHANES SQL dump from github.com/LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr - INSERT INTO users table shows user id=1 with username='admin'
NHANES SQL dump - users table row for id=1 shows fname='Administrator' and lname='Administrator'
setup_task.sh lines 43-47 - file is created at task runtime with patient details

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NHANES patient data (9,375 de-identified patients from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) downloaded from the official LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr GitHub repository. The admin user has username 'admin' with display name 'Administrator' in the database. A random unassigned patient is selected at task setup time, and their name is written to /home/ga/Desktop/task_patient.txt for the agent to read. The agent must log in with admin/password credentials and assign the 'Administrator' provider to the selected patient in the LibreHealth EHR Demographics > Choices section.
